name: Crustless Bacon & Egg Quiche
recipeIngredient: Cooked and crumbled fat-free turkey bacon
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a food processor, combine milk, baking mix, eggs, spread (Fleischmann's® Fat Free), and black pepper. Process for 15 seconds.
4. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
5. Sprinkle bacon and cheese on top.
6. Gently press below surface with a fork.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
